nasb.text: ‘They will be carried to Babylon and they will be there until the day I visit them,’ declares the Lord. ‘Then I will bring them back and restore them to this place.’ ”

esv.text: They shall be carried to Babylon and remain there until the day when I visit them, declares the Lord. Then I will bring them back and restore them to this place.”

cnv.text: ‘這些器皿必被送到巴比倫，存在那裡，直到我眷顧這些器皿的日子。那時，我必把它們帶上來，放回這地方。’”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: ‘它们必被掳到巴比伦，一直留在那里，直到有一天我眷顾以色列人，把它们带回原处。这是耶和华说的。’”
